chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 685 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 13.01.2025 Mr. Zuhaib Hassan Abro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khursheed Javed, advocate for the respondent. On 12.04.2023 objection as to maintainability was framed and counsel was confronted. Prima facie, the allegation is with respect to existence or otherwise of lease of property and it is settled law that writ jurisdiction is not amenable for such determination of property rights. Even otherwise, the issues raised require inquiry, investigation, evidence etc in the very least, which cannot be addressed in writ jurisdiction. Counsel further remains unable to address office objection as to maintainability recorded vide order dated 12.04.2023. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
